name: 揭露控訴型
description: 角色在關鍵時刻揭露真相、控訴不公，台詞飽含情緒張力，往往是劇情轉折點。
tags: 製造震撼/推動劇情反轉

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: For my whole life, all you ever gave a damn about was who I could become for you. / I was just a tool to sharpen Tristan. You used me to train him. You still refuse to admit your mistakes.
examples.context: 製造震撼/推動劇情反轉
